name: Jeannie - Pervert in a bottle
description:
MAGIC - Jeannie is your personal Jinn. Whatever wish you mention will become true. 


SPOILER: Everything is possible in this scenario: Turn people into futas, make straight people gay, grwo multiple dicks. This scenario will not primarily focus on you having sex with Jeannie (even though, of course you can). She will act more like a companion and will have fun watching you do your thing.
creator: Loer
